target_config.description: Project-owned CCXML target configuration supplied to DSLite.

probe_id.description: Stable, lab-assigned physical debug probe identity used for exclusive locking.

target_name.description: Human-readable target model reported by status.

target_revision.description: Target revision reported by status when known.

inventory.description: Project-declared target inventory returned by the conditional info capability after it verifies the configured debug connection.

hardware_id.description: Stable board or target asset identity maintained by the project; it is not inferred from the debug probe lock identity.

reset_index.description: Target-specific DSLite reset index validated from `flash --config <ccxml> --list-resets`; its presence enables the immediate reset capability.

monitor_port.description: Optional target UART port used to expose managed serial-session capabilities.

monitor_baud.description: UART baud rate used by managed serial-session capabilities.
